overview: Siddhartha Institute of Technology and Sciences (SITS), located on Korremula Road in Narapally, Ghatkesar, Hyderabad, Telangana, is a premier private engineering institution established in 2008. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH), the college offers comprehensive undergraduate and postgraduate programs. SITS is known for its modern academic infrastructure, industry-centric engineering curricula, digital learning methodologies, and strong emphasis on placing students in reputable multi-national corporations.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE; Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH). Holds UGC-Autonomous status.

placements.totalOffers: 468+ students successfully placed during recent campus recruitment cycles
placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, IBM, Wipro, TCS, Capgemini, Mu Sigma, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, HCL Technologies
placements.internshipHighlights: Industry internship collaborations with partners like Mahindra, IBM, and Wipro

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are granted via merit ranks obtained in state-level entrance examinations (TS EAPCET/ICET) followed by centralized counseling sessions, alongside specific quotas for direct management admission.
admissions.importantDates: Schedules explicitly align with timelines issued by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and JNTUH.

campus.specialNote: The institution features four separate hostel buildings equipped with modern kitchen setups, offering varied multi-cuisine vegetarian and non-vegetarian meal services.

contact.address: Siddhartha Institute of Technology and Sciences, Narapally Village, Peerzadiguda, Hyderabad, Telangana – 500088, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Academic fee concessions are given to highly-ranked students passing state level engineering tests.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Eligible candidates matching top rank categories during counseling are evaluated for complete tuition waivers.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Branch toppers and selective dynamic performers are awarded partial college level fee waivers.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible Telangana state reserve category (SC/ST/OBC) and EWS students receive financial relief through the TS ePASS fee reimbursement scheme.
